mechanism: A GitHub App (APP_GITHUB_AZUREPLATFORM_ID) is the platform's GitHub-side identity. Workflows mint short-lived tokens via actions/create-github-app-token scoped to the repository owner.
why: PATs couple to a human and never expire gracefully. GITHUB_TOKEN cannot reach other repos or org-level resources. A GitHub App provides auditable, scoped tokens without human dependency.

related.note: OIDC covers GitHub→Azure. The App covers platform→GitHub.
Entra app is Azure-side; GitHub App is GitHub-side.
Each workflow mints its own token from the same App.

violations: Workflow using a PAT for cross-repo operations.
GITHUB_TOKEN used to write org-level variables or trigger other workflows.
